description: Materialize a small literal DataFrame from inline YAML rows + optional per-column dtypes. For reference tables, fixtures, or Alteryx Text Input ports — where bundling a CSV is overkill.

rows.label: Rows
rows.description: Each row is a list of values matching `columns` length.

dtypes.label: Dtypes
dtypes.description: Per-column dtype overrides (e.g. {quantity: Int64, unit_price: float64}). Numeric dtypes route through pd.to_numeric.
